name: Bombardment
desc: Bombards the target area.

name: Recycle
desc: Slows nearby enemies. Turns dead enemies into pickups that either heal or grant money.

name: Freeze Disc
desc: Fires a bouncing disc that freezes targets.

name: Lockdown
desc: Roots all targets within the target area.

name: Surprise!
desc: Dispenses temporary items.

name: Barrier Buildup
desc: Projects a barrier onto an allied target.

name: Enfilade
desc: Rapidly fires in 4-round bursts for 4x50% damage.

name: Fusilade
desc: Shoots a 3-Round burst.

name: Heal Beam
desc: Heals an allied target.

name: Enhanced Heal Beam
desc: Heals close allies. Can heal multiple targets at once.

name: Flamethrower
desc: Burns enemies.

name: Mega Turret
desc: Shoots targets.

name: Twin Rocket
desc: Launches missiles.

name: Missile Barrage
desc: Launches missiles at nearby enemies.

name: Double Tap
desc: Rapidly shoot an enemy for 100% damage.

name: Phase Round
desc: Fire a piercing bullet for 300% damage. Deals 40% more damage every time it passes through an enemy.

name: Phase Blast
desc: Fire two close-range blasts that deal 8x200% damage total.

name: Tactical Dive
desc: Roll a short distance.

name: Tactical Slide
desc: Slide on the ground for a short distance. You can fire while sliding.

name: Suppressive Fire
desc: {{Keyword|d|Stunning}}. Fire repeatedly for 100% damage per bullet. The number of shots increases with attack speed.

name: Frag Grenade
desc: Throw a grenade that explodes for 700% damage. Can hold up to 2.

name: Laser Sword
desc: {{Keyword|u|Agile}}. Slice in front for 130% damage. Every 3rd hit strikes in a greater area and {{Keyword|u|Expose|Exposes}} enemies.

name: Whirlwind
desc: Quickly slice horizontally twice, dealing 2x200% damage. If airborne, slice vertically instead.

name: Rising Thunder
desc: Unleash a slicing uppercut, dealing 550% damage and sending you airborne.

name: Blinding Assault
desc: {{Keyword|d|Stunning}}. Dash forward, dealing 300% damage. If you hit an enemy, you can dash again, up to 3 total.

name: Focused Assault
desc: {{Keyword|d|Stunning}}. Dash forward, dealing 700% damage and {{Keyword|u|Expose|Exposing}} enemies after 1 second.

name: Eviscerate
desc: Target the nearest enemy, attacking them for 110% damage repeatedly. You cannot be hit for the duration.

name: Slicing Winds
desc: Fire a wind of blades that attack up to 3 enemies for 8x100% damage. The last hit {{Keyword|u|Expose|Exposes}} enemies.

name: Cybernetic Enhancements
desc: The Mercenary can jump twice.

name: Bouncing Grenades
desc: Charge up to 8 grenades that deal 100% damage each.

name: Pressure Mines
desc: Place a two-stage mine that deals 300% damage, or 900% damage if fully armed. Can place up to 4.

name: Spider Mines
desc: Place a robot mine that deals 600% damage when an enemy walks nearby. Can place up to 4.

name: Bubble Shield
desc: Place an impenetrable shield that blocks all incoming damage.

name: TR12 Gauss Auto-Turret
desc: Place a turret that inherits all your items. Fires a cannon for 100% damage. Can place up to 2.

name: TR58 Carbonizer Turret
desc: Place a mobile turret that inherits all your items. Fires a laser for 200% damage per second that slows enemies. Can place up to 2.

name: Thermal Harpoons
desc: Enter target painting mode to launch heat-seeking harpoons that deal 500% damage each. Can store up to 4.

name: Strafe
desc: {{Keyword|u|Agile}}. Quickly fire a seeking arrow for 150% damage.

name: Flurry
desc: {{Keyword|u|Agile}}. Draw back a volley of 3 seeking arrows for 3x100% damage. Critical Strikes fire 6 arrows.

name: Laser Glaive
desc: Throw a seeking glaive that bounces up to 6 times for 250% damage. Damage increases by 10% per bounce.

name: Blink
desc: Disappear and teleport forward.

name: Phase Blink
desc: {{Keyword|u|Agile}}. Disappear and teleport a short distance. Can store up to 3 charges.

name: Arrow Rain
desc: Teleport into the sky. Target an area to rain arrows, slowing all enemies and dealing 330% damage per second.

name: Ballista
desc: Teleport backwards into the sky. Fire up to 3 energy bolts, dealing 3x900% damage.

name: ENV Suit
desc: Holding the Jump key causes the Artificer to hover in the air.

name: Flame Bolt
desc: {{Keyword|d|Ignite}}. Fire a bolt for 280% damage. Hold up to 4.

name: Plasma Bolt
desc: Fire a bolt for 280% damage that explodes in a small area. Hold up to 4.

name: Charged Nano-Bomb
desc: {{Keyword|d|Stunning}}. Charge up a exploding nano-bomb that deals 400%-2000% damage.

name: Cast Nano-Spear
desc: {{Keyword|u|Freezing}}. Charge up a piercing nano-spear that deals 400%-1200% damage.

name: Snapfreeze
desc: {{Keyword|u|Freezing}}. Create a barrier that hurts enemies for 100% damage.

name: Flamethrower
desc: {{Keyword|d|Ignite}}. Burn all enemies in front of you for 2000% damage.

name: Ion Surge
desc: {{Keyword|d|Stunning}}. Burst into the sky, dealing 800% damage.

name: Multifunctional
desc: MUL-T can hold two equipment at once. The active equipment is swapped by using Retool.

name: Auto-Nailgun
desc: Rapidly fire nails for 70% damage. Finishes with a blast of 12 nails.

name: Rebar Puncher
desc: Fire a piercing rebar that deals 600% damage.

name: Scrap Launcher
desc: Fire a rocket that explodes for 360% damage. Hold up to 4.

name: Power-Saw
desc: Saw nearby enemies for 1000% damage per second.

name: Blast Canister
desc: {{Keyword|d|Stunning}}. Launch a canister for 220% damage. Drops stun bomblets for 5x44% damage.

name: Transport Mode
desc: {{Keyword|u|Heavy}}. Zoom forward, gaining 200 armor and 220% movement speed. Deals 250% damage to enemies.

name: Retool
desc: Passively hold TWO equipment at once. Activating 'Retool' switches the active Equipment and MUL-T's primary attack.

name: Power Mode
desc: Enter a heavy stance, equipping both your primary attacks at once. Gain 100 armor, but lose -60% movement speed.

name: Natural Toxins
desc: Certain attacks {{Keyword|d|Weaken}} enemies hit, reducing their movement speed, armor, and damage.

name: Seed Barrage
desc: 15% HP. Launch a mortar into the sky for 450% damage.

name: Bramble Volley
desc: 20% HP. Fire a {{Keyword|u|Sonic Boom}} that damages enemies for 550% damage. Heals for every target hit.

name: Tangling Growth
desc: 25% HP. Fire a flower that roots for 200% damage. Heals for every target hit.

name: Scrap Barrier
desc: The Loader is immune to fall damage. Striking enemies with the Loader's gauntlets grants a temporary barrier.

name: Knuckleboom
desc: Swing at nearby enemies for 320% damage.

name: Grapple Fist
desc: Fire your gauntlet forward, pulling you to the target.

name: Spiked Fist
desc: {{Keyword|d|Stunning}}. Fire your gauntlet forward, dealing 320% damage. Pulls you to heavy targets. Light targets are pulled to YOU instead.

name: Charged Gauntlet
desc: {{Keyword|u|Heavy}}. Charge up a piercing punch for 600%-2700% damage.

name: Thunder Gauntlet
desc: {{Keyword|u|Heavy}}. Charge up a single-target punch for 2100% damage that shocks enemies in a cone for 1000% damage.

name: M551 Pylon
desc: Throw a floating pylon that zaps up to 6 nearby enemies for 100% damage. Can be grappled.

name: Thunderslam
desc: {{Keyword|d|Stunning}}. Slam your fists down, dealing 2000% damage on impact.

name: Poison
desc: {{Keyword|h|Poisonous}} attacks apply a powerful damage-over-time.

name: Blight
desc: Attacks that apply Poison apply stacking Blight instead, dealing 60% damage per second.

name: Vicious Wounds
desc: Maul an enemy for 200% damage. Every 3rd hit is {{Keyword|h|Regenerative}} and deals 400% damage.

name: Neurotoxin
desc: {{Keyword|h|Poisonous}}. Spit toxic bile for 240% damage.

name: Ravenous Bite
desc: {{Keyword|h|Poisonous}}. {{Keyword|d|Slayer}}. {{Keyword|h|Regenerative}}. Bite an enemy for 320% damage.

name: Caustic Leap
desc: {{Keyword|h|Poisonous}}. {{Keyword|d|Stunning}}. Leap in the air, dealing 320% damage. Leave acid that deals 25% damage.

name: Frenzied Leap
desc: {{Keyword|d|Stunning}}. Leap in the air, dealing 550% damage. Reduce the cooldown by 2s for every enemy hit.

name: Epidemic
desc: {{Keyword|h|Poisonous}}. Release a deadly disease that deals 100% damage. The disease spreads to up to 20 targets.

name: Defensive Microbots
desc: Passively gain Microbots that shoot down nearby enemy projectiles. Drones are also given Microbots.

name: Vulcan Shotgun
desc: Fire a blast of pellets that deal 8x120% damage. Charging the attack narrows the spread.

name: Power Tazer
desc: {{Keyword|d|Shocking}}. Fire a fast tazer that deals 100% damage. Travels farther if bounced.

name: Orbital Probe
desc: {{Keyword|d|Stunning}}. Request up to 3 Orbital Probes from the UES Safe Travels. Each probe deals 1000% damage.

name: OGM-72 'DIABLO' Strike
desc: {{Keyword|d|Stunning}}. Request a kinetic strike from the UES Safe Travels. After 20 seconds, it deals 40,000% damage to ALL characters.

name: Orbital Supply Beacon
desc: Request a permanent Supply Beacon. Can only be requested twice per stage.

name: Backstab
desc: All attacks from behind are Critical Strikes.

name: Burst
desc: Fire a shotgun burst for 5x100% damage. Can hold up to 4 shells.

name: Blast
desc: Fire a rifle blast for 330% damage. Can hold up to 4 bullets.

name: Serrated Dagger
desc: Lunge and slash for 360% damage. Critical Strikes also cause {{Keyword|hp|Hemorrhage|hemorrhaging}}.

name: Serrated Shiv
desc: Throw a hidden blade for 240% damage. Critical Strikes also cause {{Keyword|hp|Hemorrhage|hemorrhaging}}.

name: Smoke Bomb
desc: {{Keyword|d|Stunning}}. Deal 200% damage, become invisible, then deal 200% damage again.

name: Lights Out
desc: {{Keyword|d|Slayer}}. Fire a revolver shot for 600% damage. Kills reset all your cooldowns.

name: Desperado
desc: {{Keyword|d|Slayer}}. Fire a revolver shot for 600% damage. Kills grant stacking tokens for 10% more Desperado damage.

name: Nevermore
desc: Squawk a solemn reply.

name: Hungering Gaze
desc: Fire a flurry of tracking shards that detonate after a delay, dealing 120% base damage. Hold up to 12 charges (+12 per stack) that reload after 2 seconds (+2 per stack).

name: Shadowfade
desc: Fade away, becoming intangible and gaining +30% movement speed. Heal for 18.2% (+18.2% per stack) of your maximum health. Lasts 3 (+3 per stack) seconds.

name: Slicing Maelstrom
desc: Charge up a projectile that deals 875% damage per second to nearby enemies, exploding after 3 seconds to deal 700% damage and root enemies for 3 (+3 per stack) seconds. Recharges after 5 (+5 per stack) seconds.

name: Ruin
desc: Dealing damage adds a stack of Ruin for 10 (+10 per stack) seconds. Activating the skill detonates all Ruin stacks at unlimited range, dealing 300% damage plus 120% damage per stack of Ruin. Recharges after 8 (+8 per stack) seconds.

name: Magnetic Accelerator
desc: All Critical Strike Chance is converted into Critical Strike Damage.

name: XQR Smart Round System
desc: Fire aggressive tracking rounds for 100% damage.

name: M99
desc: Launch a heavy projectile for 1000% damage.

name: Active Reload
desc: Perfectly time your reload to recover faster and to boost the damage of your next shot by +500% base damage.

name: HH44
desc: Launch a light projectile for 400% damage.

name: Supercharged Railgun
desc: Launch a super-charged projectile for 4000% damage. Critical Strike damage is multiplied by 1.5.

name: Cryocharged Railgun
desc: Freezing. Launch a super-cooled projectile for 350% damage.

name: M99 Sniper
desc: Activate your long-range scope, highlighting Weak Points and transforming your weapon into a piercing 1000% damage railgun.

name: HH44 Marksman
desc: Activate your short-range scope, highlighting Weak Points and transforming your weapon into a quick 400% damage railgun.

name: Concussion Device
desc: Throw out a device that pushes you and all nearby enemies away. Can hold up to 2.

name: Polar Field Device
desc: Throw out a device that slows down all nearby enemies and projectiles.

name: Supercharge
desc: Fire a piercing round for 4000% damage and 150% Weak Point damage. Afterwards, all your weapons are disabled for 5 seconds.

name: Cryocharge
desc: {{Keyword|u|Freezing}}. Fire a piercing round for 2000% damage.

name: Void Corruption
desc: At full Corruption, transform your abilities into more aggressive forms.

name: Drown
desc: Fire a slowing long-range beam for 300% damage.

name: Corrupted Drown
desc: Fire a short-range beam for 2000% damage.

name: Flood
desc: Fire a plasma missile for 600% damage. Fully charge it for an explosive plasma ball instead, dealing 1100% damage.

name: Corrupted Flood
desc: Fire a an arcing plasma bomb for 1100% damage.

name: Trespass
desc: Disappear into the Void, cleansing all debuffs while moving in an upward arc.

name: Corrupted Trespass
desc: Disappear into the Void, cleansing all debuffs while moving at a fast forward angle.

name: Suppress
desc: Crush 25% Corruption to heal yourself for 25% maximum health.

name: Corrupted Suppress
desc: Crush 25% maximum health to gain 25% Corruption.

name: Inner Strength
desc: Abilities are enhanced with each Tranquility to a maximum of 7.

name: Spirit Punch
desc: Fire piercing disembodied fists at enemies for 250% damage. Every 3rd hit explodes dealing 350% damage.

name: Unseen Hand
desc: {{Keyword|d|Stunning}}. Launch a piercing phantasmal hand from the ground, dealing 600% damage. Heals for 3.5% of the damage dealt.

name: Soul Spiral
desc: Manifest spiraling orbs dealing 150% damage. Hits grant temporary barrier. {{Keyword|u|Exhilarate}} on activation at max orbs.

name: Sojourn
desc: {{Keyword|d|Stunning}}. Take flight and explode, dealing 500% damage. Exchange 25% health per second for increased damage.

name: Reprieve
desc: Gain barrier and take flight. Total barrier loss or impact creates a {{Keyword|u|Cyclone|cyclone}}, healing allies, and dealing 200% damage per second.

name: Meditate
desc: Focus your mind to blast enemies for 300% damage, heal nearby allies, and gain {{Keyword|u|Tranquility}}. Reaching max {{Keyword|u|Tranquility}} {{Keyword|h|Revive|Revives}} and grants {{Keyword|h|Saving Grace}}.

name: Palm Blast
desc: Charge a piercing, spectral hand that deals 400%-700% damage and heals allies. {{Keyword|d|Multihit}} three characters to gain {{Keyword|u|Tranquility}} and barrier.

name: Lunar Tampering
desc: Every unused Lunar Spike gives +5% attack speed and +2.5 armor. Used spikes give +5% movement speed and +2.5 health regeneration.

name: Club of the Forsaken
desc: Swing for 450% damage. Hold the primary and secondary buttons to charge a slam for 1000% damage.

name: Lunar Spikes
desc: {{Keyword|u|Lunar Ruin}}. {{Keyword|u|Agile}}. Throw a Lunar Spike for 200% damage. Gain more Lunar Spikes through {{Keyword|h|Growth}}.

name: Lunar Stakes
desc: {{Keyword|u|Lunar Ruin}}. Fire a piercing, {{Keyword|d|Lunar Lightning|lightning}} infused Lunar Stake for 300% damage. Gain more Lunar Stakes through {{Keyword|h|Growth}}. Counts as 2 Lunar Spikes.

name: Step of the Brothers
desc: Dash a short distance, generating an explosion of 200% damage for every enemy hit. Two uses.

name: Meridian's Will
desc: {{Keyword|d|Stunning}}. Teleport and explode for 150% damage and pull enemies. Triple your passive's benefits for 4s. {{Keyword|h|Growth}} increases this duration.

name: Laser of the Father
desc: Charge a rapidly hitting laser dealing 240%-1400% damage for 4 seconds and refill Lunar Spikes. Increases in duration through {{Keyword|h|Growth}}.

name: Laser Burst
desc: Fire a piercing laser for 1250% damage, refilling 50% Lunar Spikes. Increases in stock by {{Keyword|h|Growth}}.

name: CHEF's Kiss
desc: Killing enemies with 2 or more skills cooks them up and drops a healing food item.

name: Dice
desc: Throw a piercing cleaver through enemies for 200% damage. Holding the attack doubles recall damage.

name: Sear
desc: {{Keyword|d|Ignite}}. Scorch nearby enemies for 600% damage.

name: Ice Box
desc: {{Keyword|u|Frost}}. Launch ice cubes for 3x150 damage.

name: Roll
desc: {{Keyword|d|Stunning}}. Charge the rolling pin to speed forward, dealing 300%-600% damage.

name: Oil Spill
desc: Twirl upwards then slam down, exploding with {{Keyword|u|Oil|oil}} for 200% damage. Launch again by reactivating this ability before landing, up to 4 total.

name: Glaze
desc: Fire globs of {{Keyword|u|Oil|oil}} in quick succession, dealing 7x250 damage.

name: Yes, CHEF!
desc: Emit a blast attack dealing 400% damage, inflicting {{Keyword|d|Ignite}} or {{Keyword|u|Frost}}. Boosts the next Skill used.

name: Boosted Dice
desc: Throws cleavers in all directions, dealing 400% damage.

name: Boosted Sear
desc: Scorch nearby enemies and fire three fireballs dealing 700% damage. Flaming oil blobs leave ignited {{Keyword|u|Oil Pool|oil pools}} on impact.

name: Boosted Ice Box
desc: {{Keyword|u|Freezing}}. Launches 1 large ice cube for 1500% damage.

name: Boosted Roll
desc: Bleeding. Speed forward while spinning cutlery to deal an additional 200% damage to all nearby enemies.

name: Boosted Oil Spill
desc: Twirl upwards then slam down, exploding with activated {{Keyword|u|Oil|oil}} for 200% damage. Launch again by reactivating this ability before landing.

name: Trash to Treasure
desc: Recycle. Gain stackable buffs by carrying Item Scrap.

name: Blunt Force
desc: Bash enemies for 170% damage. The third hit deals 350% damage and stuns enemies. Has a chance to drop Junk.

name: Cleanup
desc: Toss a volley of debris for 4x100% damage, as well as the random projectile in your bag. Can consume 2 Junk to bypass cooldown.

name: Junk Cube
desc: Slam down a Junk Cube for 400% damage. Hitting a Junk Cube will launch it, impacting enemies for 400% damage up to 3 times before exploding for 800% damage. Can consume 4 Junk to bypass cooldown.

name: Repossess
desc: Leap forward and bag a monster or interactable. Use again to throw your bag's contents. Captured objects are Bludgeoned.

name: Bludgeon
desc: Bash enemies with your bagged object for 280% damage that scales with the object's mass. Drops Junk and damages the object with each hit. Monsters break out after 3 hits.

name: Discard
desc: Toss the held object from your bag. Stun on impact and deal 280% damage that scales with the object's mass. Drops Junk.

name: Tornado Slam
desc: Spin forwards, smacking enemies for 220% damage per hit with a chance to drop Junk, and then slam for 600%. Ricochets off of heavy enemies. Cancel with Primary Skill or by jumping.

name: Salvage
desc: Consume 8 Junk to spawn 4 temporary items.

name: Tinker
desc: Stunning. Consume 8 Junk to cast a shockwave for 100% damage that applies a random debuff and tinkers with an item pickup or item-holding interactable. Effects vary based on target.

name: Drone Tech
desc: Start each stage with 2 drone companions.

name: H3-11 OCR Custom
desc: Fire a pistol shot that deals 150%-600% damage and ricochets on kill. Restores charge over time.

name: ADMIN-OVERRIDE
desc: Command a drone to activate its Special skill. Can store a charge for each drone you control.

name: CMD-SWARM
desc: Enter target-painting mode to command your drones to ram enemies for 450% damage. Critical Strikes also ignite.

name: Ascent Protocol
desc: Command a drone to lift you into the air for a controlled fall to the ground. Can be reactivated to leap to another drone.

name: FIREWALL
desc: Command a drone to charge up a shield that blocks damage. Release to fire it forward for 200%-600% damage.

name: Ejection Core
desc: Launch a drone that knocks enemies into the air for 300% damage. Enemies are Nano-Bugged until they hit the ground.

name: Amp Core
desc: Launch a drone that charges up by absorbing damage. After a short duration, it explodes, dealing 300-2000% damage.

name: Gunner Drone Mk 2
desc: A customized gunner drone will spawn with you at the start of each stage. Automatically repairs when downed.

name: Healing Drone Mk 2
desc: A customized healing drone will spawn with you at the start of each stage. Automatically repairs when downed.

name: Transport Drone Mk 2
desc: A customized transport drone will spawn with you at the start of each stage. Automatically repairs when downed.
